# Email Outreach Templates

## Template 1: AI Newsletter Editors

**Subject:** Open-source tool for AI compliance auditing (EU AI Act, GDPR)

Hi [Name],

I've been following [Newsletter Name] and thought you might be interested in a new open-source project I've been working on.

**ComplianceStack** is an open-source MCP server that audits AI models against 5 regulatory frameworks (EU AI Act, GDPR, NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001, India DPDP Act) with a 17-phase audit pipeline.

Key features:
- Native integration with Claude Desktop, Cursor via MCP
- Zero data egress - completely on-premise
- W3C Verifiable Credentials for compliance proof
- BLOCKER FAIL mechanism prevents non-compliant deployments

With the EU AI Act now in law and enforcement ramping up, I thought this might be relevant for your readers navigating AI compliance.

GitHub: https://github.com/nyayoshbharuchanb15-max/ComplianceStack

Would you be interested in covering this? Happy to provide more details or do an interview.

Best,
[Your Name]

---

## Template 2: AI Conference Organizers

**Subject:** Speaking proposal: AI Compliance in Practice with ComplianceStack

Hi [Name],

I'm reaching out regarding speaking opportunities at [Conference Name].

I've developed **ComplianceStack**, an open-source AI compliance platform that audits models against 5 regulatory frameworks. I'd love to present on:

**Talk Title:** "AI Compliance in Practice: From Regulation to Implementation"

**Abstract:**
- The current AI regulatory landscape (EU AI Act, GDPR, NIST AI RMF)
- How to implement compliance auditing in practice
- Live demo of ComplianceStack auditing an AI model
- Lessons learned from building open-source compliance tooling

**Key takeaways:**
- Practical steps for AI compliance
- Open-source tools available today
- How to integrate compliance into development workflows

The talk would include a live demo showing how ComplianceStack works with Claude Desktop to audit AI models in real-time.

Would this be relevant for your audience? Happy to provide more details.

Best,
[Your Name]

---

## Template 3: AI Ethics Organizations

**Subject:** Open-source AI compliance tool for ethical AI deployment

Hi [Name],

I'm reaching out because I've been working on a project that aligns with [Organization]'s mission of promoting ethical AI.

**ComplianceStack** is an open-source AI compliance platform that helps organizations audit their AI models against:
- EU AI Act (risk classification, human oversight, bias)
- GDPR (data protection)
- NIST AI RMF (risk management)
- ISO/IEC 42001 (AI management system)
- India DPDP Act (data protection)

Key features:
- 17-phase audit pipeline
- Zero data egress - completely on-premise
- Bias assessment using Fairlearn
- W3C Verifiable Credentials for compliance proof

I believe this could be valuable for organizations working on ethical AI deployment.

GitHub: https://github.com/nyayoshbharuchanb15-max/ComplianceStack

Would you be interested in learning more or collaborating?

Best,
[Your Name]

---

## Template 4: AI Tool Directories

**Subject:** Submit ComplianceStack to [Directory Name]

Hi [Name],

I'd like to submit **ComplianceStack** for inclusion in [Directory Name].

**Description:**
ComplianceStack is an open-source MCP server that audits AI models against 5 regulatory frameworks with a 17-phase audit pipeline. It integrates with Claude Desktop, Cursor, and Windsurf via the Model Context Protocol.

**Category:** AI Tools, Compliance, Governance

**Key features:**
- EU AI Act compliance auditing
- GDPR DPIA generation
- Bias assessment with Fairlearn
- W3C Verifiable Credentials
- Zero data egress architecture

**URL:** https://github.com/nyayoshbharuchanb15-max/ComplianceStack

Please let me know if you need any additional information.

Best,
[Your Name]
